index.faq_item_text_1: {site_name} is a fully licensed, legitimate cryptocurrency trading platform. We are registered in {country_name} and comply with all local regulations. We use bank-level security (SSL encryption and 2FA) to protect your funds and data and thousands of real {country_name} traders use {site_name} every day. Unlike scams, {site_name} never promises guaranteed profits or hides information. We openly share our fees, security practices, and the risks involved with trading.
index.faq_item_title_2: Can I start with {currency}, and how quickly can I trade?
index.faq_item_text_2: Absolutely. The minimum deposit is only {currency}. After verifying your account, you can deposit and start trading in minutes. We accept cards, bank transfers, and popular e-wallets. Deposits appear quickly (card payments arrive almost instantly), so you can place your first trade right away. Just remember to start with an amount you’re comfortable with.
index.faq_item_title_3: How do I withdraw my earnings?
index.faq_item_text_3: Withdrawing from {site_name} is straightforward. Go to your account’s «Withdraw» page, enter the amount, and choose a withdrawal method (bank transfer, card, or e-wallet). Confirm the withdrawal and {site_name} will process it. Withdrawals typically complete within 24 hours (depending on the method). You only pay standard transaction fees; {site_name} does not charge extra withdrawal fees. Your funds will be sent securely back to you.
index.faq_item_title_4: What are the fees and costs?
index.faq_item_text_4: {site_name} keeps fees simple. We do not charge any registration or maintenance fees. The only fees you’ll see are small trading fees (like spreads or commissions) and any fees from your payment provider. These fees are clearly shown before you finalize a trade. We never hide costs — what you see is what you pay.
index.faq_item_title_5: Will I definitely make money trading crypto?
index.faq_item_text_5: No, profits are never guaranteed. Cryptocurrency prices can rise, but they can also fall. {site_name} provides a transparent and secure platform, but your success depends on market conditions and your decisions. We encourage you to trade responsibly: use risk management features, stay informed, and only invest your extra and not the last penny.
